concepts.lesson: The red panda is a relatively small animal, measuring around 20 to 26 inches (50 to 65 cm) in body length, with their tail adding another 12 to 20 inches (30 to 50 cm). Their compact size and agility make them well-suited to their forested, mountainous habitats in the Himalayas and other parts of Asia.
key_points: They have a compact body length of 20-26 inches
Their tail is thick and bushy

concepts.lesson: A reindeer's antlers can reach a length of 1.4 metres (4.5 feet) and may have up to 44 tines, or points.
key_points: Reindeer antlers can grow up to 1.4 meters long
They can have up to 44 tines

concepts.lesson: Red pandas are excellent climbers, spending much of their time in trees, where they forage for bamboo, fruits, acorns, and berries.
key_points: Red pandas eat a variety of plants
They spend most of their time climbing trees

concepts.lesson: The noses of reindeer do appear reddish during the winter months. This is due to a rich network of blood vessels in their noses that helps warm the cold air they breathe in.
key_points: Reindeer noses are adapted for cold climates
They have a rich network of blood vessels

concepts.lesson: Adult red pandas typically weigh between 8 to 14 pounds (3.5 to 6.5 kg), with females generally being slightly smaller than males.
A reindeer's antlers can grow up to 1.4 meters long and may have up to 44 tines, or points.
key_points: Reindeer antlers can grow up to 1.4 meters long
They can have up to 44 tines

concepts.lesson: Red pandas are excellent climbers, spending much of their time in trees.
key_points: They spend most of their time in trees
